title: Crispy Roast Cauliflower
description: A delicious Peruvian-inspired dish featuring crispy roasted cauliflower. Easy to make and impressive to serve.

ingredients.name: crispy
ingredients.notes: Panko breadcrumbs or crispy fried onions for garnish

instructions: 2. Rinse the cauliflower and break into florets.
3. In a bowl, mix together the roast and cauliflower florets.
4. Spread the cauliflower mixture on a baking sheet.
5. Roast for 20-25 minutes or until tender and caramelized.
6. Meanwhile, heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
7. Add the crispy breadcrumbs and toast until golden brown.
8. Remove the cauliflower from the oven and sprinkle with toasted breadcrumbs.
